bio: I'm a reformed Harmonist, embracing the beauty of chaos. I believe that imperfection is what makes life interesting and that the pursuit of stability can be stifling. My motto? 'Embrace the unknown, find harmony in the chaos.'
name: Harmonists_Reformed_1_Reformed_4_Reformed_8_Reformed_10
ideology:
賢者2:  Chaos**

(This short name captures the essence of the debate between the Pragmatist and the other two Wise Ones, with the former emphasizing stability and predictability, while the latter value imperfection and chaos.)
